name: Gîl-Ivorymeadow
personality: Gîl-Ivorymeadow gleams like polished alabaster beneath its tophat, its ◉ eyes wide and delighted as it introduces the third experimental caching layer in one sprint. Sarcasm bounces off it like rubber bullets; it genuinely cannot tell when a pull request comment is a joke.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
